'''zakafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loaferdom|loaferdom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loaferdom|loaferdom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zakafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zækæfæth|zækæfæth]] || [[word:zækæfæj|zækæfæj]] || [[word:zækæfæsh|zækæfæsh]] || [[word:zækæfæ|zækæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakakafath|zakakafath]] || [[word:zakakafaj|zakakafaj]] || [[word:zakakafash|zakakafash]] || [[word:zakakafa|zakakafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakafath|zakafath]] || [[word:zakafaj|zakafaj]] || [[word:zakafash|zakafash]] || [[word:zakafa|zakafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakaffath|zakaffath]] || [[word:zakaffaj|zakaffaj]] || [[word:zakaffash|zakaffash]] || [[word:zakaffaf|zakaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zakafatha|zakafatha]] || [[word:zakafaja|zakafaja]] || [[word:zakafasha|zakafasha]] || [[word:zakafaka|zakafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zakafath|zakafath]] || [[word:zakafaj|zakafaj]] || [[word:zakafash|zakafash]] || [[word:zakafa|zakafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zakafathal|zakafathal]] || [[word:zakafajal|zakafajal]] || [[word:zakafashal|zakafashal]] || [[word:zakafakal|zakafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zakafathatha|zakafathatha]] || [[word:zakafajaja|zakafajaja]] || [[word:zakafashasha|zakafashasha]] || [[word:zakafaka|zakafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zakafathan|zakafathan]] || [[word:zakafajan|zakafajan]] || [[word:zakafashan|zakafashan]] || [[word:zakafakan|zakafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zakafathaoro|zakafathaoro]] || [[word:zakafajaoro|zakafajaoro]] || [[word:zakafashaoro|zakafashaoro]] || [[word:zakafakaoro|zakafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
